    • XML
      • TextAnalysisAndFormatting - DataTraversal.
      • [[UTF8]]
      • http://savage.net.au/misc/Mojo.Wiki.html
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/Alien-pugixml - Find or build pugixml C++ XML parser library.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Chain - A chained way of manipulating and inspecting XML documents.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::DOM - A perl module for building DOM Level 1 compliant document structures.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Easy - XML processing with a clean interface.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Easy::NodeBasics - Basic manipulation of XML data nodes.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Easy::ProceduralWriter - Even easier writing of XML.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Easy::SimpleSchemaUtil - Help with simple kinds of XML schema.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Enc - A toolkit to help encrypt and decrypt XML Digital Signatures.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Entities - Decode strings with XML entities.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Fast - Simple and very fast XML - hash conversion.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Feed - Syndication feed parser and auto-discovery.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::GDOME - Interface to Level 2 DOM gdome2 library.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Hash-XS - Simple and fast hash to XML and XML to hash conversion written in C.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-IETF - An interface to the IETF XML Registry..
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-LibXML - Perl Binding for libxml2.
      • http://grantm.github.io/perl-libxml-by-example/
      • Supports parsing huge documents
      • Supports parsing (possibly faulty) HTML
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::LibXSLT - Interface to the GNOME libxslt library.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-MyXML - A simple-to-use XML module, for parsing and creating XML documents.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Parser - A perl module for parsing XML documents.
      • Includes XML::Parser::Expat
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-PP - A simple XML parser.
      • Prefer XML::Simple or XML::LibXML
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-PugiXML - Perl binding for pugixml C++ XML parser.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Sablotron - A Perl interface to the Sablotron XSLT processor.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Saxon::XSLT2 - Process XSLT 2.0 using Saxon 9.x.
      • http://saxon.sourceforge.net/
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Sig - A toolkit to help sign and verify XML Digital Signatures.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Sig-OO - Modern XML Signatured validation.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/HTML-Similarity - Calculate the structural similarity between two XML documents.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/XML::Simple - An API for simple XML files - Deprecated.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-TreeBuilder - Parser that builds a tree of XML::Element objects.
      • Contains XML::Element
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/XML-Twig - A Perl module for processing huge XML documents in tree mode.

      • https://metacpan.org/pod/Config::XrmDatabase - Pure Perl X Resource Manager Database.

      • The framework allows applications to display pop-up notifications on an X desktop
      • More information is available from http://trac.galago-project.org/wiki/DesktopNotifications

      • See the module's own docs for an explanation - Read the 'YAML front matter' format.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/YAMLScript - Program in YAML â Code is Data.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/YAMLStar - Pure YAML 1.2 loader via FFI.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/YAML - YAML Ain't Markup Languageâ¢.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/YAML::PP - YAML 1.2 processor.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/YAML::PP::LibYAML - Faster parsing for YAML::PP.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/YAML::LibYAML::API - Wrapper around the C libyaml library.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/YAML-Safe - Safe Perl YAML Serialization using XS and libyaml.
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/YAML-Syck - Fast, lightweight YAML loader and dumper.
      • See also JSON::Syck
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/YAML::Tiny - Read/Write YAML files with as little code as possible.
      • https://metacpan.org/pod/YAML::XS - Perl YAML Serialization using XS and libyaml.
      • But see YAML::Safe
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/YAML-Syck - Fast, lightweight YAML loader and dumper - Deprecated.
      • Use JSON::XS instead
      • https://metacpan.org/dist/Yote-Spiderpup - Compile YAML recipes into reactive JavaScript and HTML.
      • See also Yote::SQLObjectStore
